flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern Oklahoma Technology Center fell 59% between 2006 and 2009 (84.1% → 34.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southern Oklahoma Technology Center rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (75.0% → 100.0%).
